info.title: MentisEterna API
info.description: Personal note-taking app with vector search, note-type plugins, and file attachments. All API endpoints except `/login` and `/webauthn/*` require a Bearer token (obtained via password login or passkey login).

bearerAuth.description: Session token obtained from POST /login or passkey login.

cookieAuth.name: auth_token
cookieAuth.description: Cookie set automatically after login. Used by browser-embedded resource requests (img, video, etc.).

parent_id.description: Parent note ID (null for root notes)

tags.description: Tag names attached to this note

url.description: Relative URL to serve the file content

body.description: Body content at this point in history

child_count.description: Number of children this note has

distance.description: Cosine distance from query embedding (lower = more relevant)

default_config.description: Default config payload for new notes of this type

has_config.description: Whether this type stores persistent configuration

has_view.description: Whether this type generates computed view data

has_actions.description: Whether this type supports RPC actions

mode.description: How the frontend should render the editor

schema.description: FormKit-compatible JSON schema (only when mode is 'schema')

mode.description: How the frontend should render the viewer

params_schema.description: JSON Schema for the params payload

dangerous.description: Whether the action has destructive side effects

refresh_strategy.description: What the frontend should refresh after execution

success_message.description: Message to show the user on success

custom_data.description: Plugin-specific config payload (validated by the note type)

markdown.description: Markdown snippet to insert into the note body

200.description: Login successful. The response includes a Bearer token and sets an auth_token cookie.

get.description: Requires an existing session. Returns WebAuthn creation options.

post.description: Completes WebAuthn registration with the attestation response from the browser.

get.description: Does not require a session. Returns WebAuthn request options for discoverable credentials.

post.description: Completes WebAuthn login with the assertion response from the browser. Returns a session token.

get.description: Returns the catalog of all available note types, including the synthetic 'standard' type. Each entry includes static metadata, editor/viewer modes, action definitions, and capability flags. Use this to populate type pickers and determine whether a type is schema-driven or custom-rendered.
Returns a lightweight summary of all notes, ordered by pinned status then last-updated time descending. Plugin data is not included in this response.

post.description: Creates a new note. If title is empty/blank, it defaults to 'Untitled'. If type is empty, it defaults to 'standard'. Returns the full note detail with plugin config/view populated.

400.description: Invalid JSON or plugin validation failed

get.description: Performs a semantic (vector) search across note bodies, OCR text, and STT text. Results are ranked by cosine distance. Falls back to empty results if VSS is unavailable.
Returns the full note detail including plugin config, plugin view, tags, and attachments.

put.description: Updates a note's title, body, parent, type, custom_data, and tags. Creates a new history entry. Returns the full note detail.

400.description: Invalid JSON or plugin validation failed

delete.description: Deletes a note and all its history, plugin data (via CASCADE), and VSS embedding. Attached files with no remaining references are soft-deleted.

get.description: Returns all direct children of this note, ordered by creation date ascending. Each child includes a child_count.
Returns the full ancestor chain from root to this note (root-first order).

post.description: Sets the pinned status of a note. Returns the full note detail.
Legacy action endpoint. Prefer `POST /notes/:id/actions/:actionID` for new integrations. Dispatches to the same unified handler.

404.description: Note not found or no actions for this type

post.description: Executes a named plugin action on a note. Action metadata (ID, params schema, etc.) is discoverable via GET /note-types.

404.description: Note not found, type not registered, or no action handler for this type

post.description: Uploads a file as a note attachment. The file is persisted to S3 (or local cache) and an attachment reference is created. OCR/STT is enqueued for images/audio.

Uploads a file for inline use in the note body. Returns a markdown snippet (![alt](url) for images, [name](url) otherwise). The file is reconciled into a permanent ref when the note body references it.

delete.description: Removes the attachment reference between the note and file. If no other references exist, the file is soft-deleted.

get.description: Serves decrypted file content. The noteID is cosmetic for URL construction; only fileID controls access.

200.description: File content (binary, Content-Type set from stored MIME type)

get.description: Returns the OCR result for a file (if available).

404.description: File not found or no OCR result available

get.description: Returns the speech-to-text result for a file (if available).

404.description: File not found or no STT result available

get.description: Returns known tag names, optionally filtered by prefix.
Returns the 50 most recent job runs.

post.description: Enqueues an on-demand encrypted database backup. Requires BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY and S3 configuration.
Enqueues a retention policy purge that deletes expired backups across all S3 endpoints.
